title: rajedev/LangGraph_Trails
summary: Practice Code on LangGraph (AI)

title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: bharat2808/codex-ollama-proxy
summary: Use Ollama and OpenRouter with Codex plugins, MCP tools, tool_search and apply_patch.

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: dovvnloading/Graphlink
summary: Graphlink (formerly Graphite) is a local-first, graph-based AI workspace for building branching reasoning workflows, running agent plugins, and orchestrating multiple AI providers in a visual environment designed for complex problem solving.

title: tylerreckart/arbiter
summary: The intelligence layer for whatever you're building.

title: dryvist/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake

title: mabaeyens/mira-core
summary: Local AI assistant backend — FastAPI, autonomous web search, RAG, and streaming. Runs fully offline on macOS

title: hemilier001-afk/Memilier
summary: Hemilier 桌面智能体：对话 + 工具调用 + 文件/命令操作 + 联网搜索，由本地 Ollama 或云端 DeepSeek/OpenAI 兼容模型驱动。Electron + React + TypeScript。

title: Danyalkhattak/Xirea-Desktop
summary: Official desktop version of Xirea built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.

title: mikeljc-dev/docsera
summary: AI chat widget for your docs — open source, self-hosted, privacy-first. RAG with citations. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI or local models via Ollama.

title: vizadrex/chat-ia-local
summary: Chat tipo ChatGPT para modelos locales de Ollama, con streaming e historial (React)

title: vizadrex/notespass
summary: Espacio de trabajo con ventanas, notas, musica e IA local por comandos (React + TS + Ollama)

title: niansahc/ember-2
summary: A local, private personal intelligence system. Not a chatbot.

title: AdrianMedico/oroimen
summary: Local-first, self-hosted personal AI assistant with private memory, RAG, prompt-injection defenses, and explicit GPT-5.6 frontier opt-in.

title: famclaw/famclaw
summary: Self-hosted family AI gateway with parental controls. Runs on Linux, macOS, and Android (Termux) — Raspberry Pi, mini PC, old laptop, homelab server, even a phone. Telegram, Discord, web. Privacy-first, works with any LLM (local or cloud), OPA content filtering, MCP skill scanning.

title: salpenr/gainsay
summary: Local, privacy-first cited-answer engine that surfaces disagreement: answers from web + your local docs + scholarly sources with inline citations, then cross-checks the answer against those sources to show where they agree and contradict. RAG over a local Ollama model. MIT.
